programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: For DIRT’s first trip across the pond, host Josh Rosen dove head first into Ireland. From long-held traditions to the modern-day artisanal movement, he unearthed the multicultural goldmine between the highlands and the Wild Atlantic Way—with stops for surfing, a seaweed bath, and a couple holes of golf spectated by free-range goats, of course. Foraged cocktails? Fresh crabs from Galway Bay? It’s all on the table in this episode rooted in community, homegrown ingredients, and the damn good people who bring it all together. Subscribe to our YouTube channel to catch up on all of DIRT’s past adventures.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Hop in the float plane—a new episode of DIRT just dropped. The DIRT crew made their way to Alaska, “the land of earth, sea, and sky.” All feast, no sleep is the name of the game as Josh makes the most of Alaska’s abundant and legendary daylight alongside local guides, fishermen, and even a couple grizzlies. There’ll be plenty of time to hibernate in winter. But for now—join us—there are halibut to filet, rainforest ’shrooms to forage, and mountainside meals to cook up.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep105: Whale Sharks…Gentle Giants
programme.desc: Whale Sharks, gentle giants of the sea, can reach nearly 50 feet in length and weigh over 30 tons! With space age technology, researchers can identify, catalogue and track individual sharks. In Mexico and Western Australia, whale shark tourism has proven to be both a blessing and a curse. Also featured is the remarkable story of the capture and transport of whale sharks to the Georgia Aquarium in Atlanta.

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep103: Philippines
programme.desc: It started as an adventure to Cloud 9 for a surfing contest that turns into a cultural expedition and full-blown typhoon chasing surf trip to the northern regions and secret surf breaks of the Philippines. programme.desc: Coming up this week, we return to Australia for another report from the Moomba Masters and this week we look at the wakeboarding. We'll take you to Italy with coverage of the L30 Offshore Mixed Europeans. But first we'll take you to Austria for highlights from the Surf Games.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep108: La Paz & Loreto, Mexico
programme.desc: Highlights include kayaking the Sea of Cortez, a tour of Loreto, kitesurfing, Bismark Cito, Costabaja Resort, nightlife, plus a tour of La Paz as well as local music.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The challenges have only gotten started. In episode two, the teams must go beyond their limits to come out on top. From the brutal Blah line to building their own shelters with only a small ax, it’s a battle for scoring points and survival that’ll test these elite competitors like never before.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: After a grueling night braving the elements, the second half of the challenge continues. The All-Stars and Space Cowboys are pushed to the limit when they are tasked with fabricating their own survival structures. Then, catastrophe strikes on the rope climbs, a timber hitch tests the group’s endurance and the day finishes off with Uncle Sam’s Misguided Children’s stress course. Will the All-Stars make it through? Only time will tell.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: A Finnish defense course tests the contestants' marksmanship and combat medical training. Later, Don serves dinner with a twist. To cap off the competition, the two teams face off in a sniper hide “cat and mouse” challenge. Find out who wins this legendary All Star competition.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: This episode of Wildshots kicks off in South Carolina, where Tim Harmsen goes behind the scenes at Jacob Grey Firearms for an inside look at precision craftsmanship in action. Known for their stunning 2011 pistols—true works of art—Jacob Grey takes perfection to the micron. From raw metal to “The Hex,” Tim witnesses how engineering meets artistry to create one of America’s most elite handguns.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: Tim heads to the Smoky Mountains for an action-packed adventure that’s as sharp as it gets. The journey kicks off at the world-famous Smoky Mountain Knife Works, the largest knife store on the planet, where Tim explores the artistry and precision behind the blades of We Knife. There, he reconnects with shooting legend Kyle Lamb, who shares his thoughts on the craftsmanship that keeps professionals equipped for anything. The action continues at Buds Gun Shop, where Tim joins Kyle once again to complete two of Lamb’s signature courses—the intense “Chaos Drill” and the dynamic “Triple Threat.” Together, they test speed, accuracy, and the mental discipline needed to master the range. But the day wouldn’t be complete without a little backwoods ingenuity. IraqVeteran8888 joins Tim for a bit of unconventional fun—combining creativity, curiosity, and some good old Redneck Science to wrap up an unforgettable episode.

programme.title: S1E2 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Trenten Merrill, an American Paralympic long jumper who claimed bronze at the 2020 Summer Paralympics. Also featured is Casey Patterson, a powerhouse in professional beach volleyball with numerous AVP tournament wins, a gold medal on the FIVB World Tour, and an appearance at the 2016 Rio Olympics alongside Jake Gibb. Tennis legends Bob and Mike Bryan, the most successful doubles team in history, take the spotlight with 16 Grand Slam titles, 119 ATP Tour doubles victories, 438 weeks as the world’s No. 1 team, and Olympic gold in 2012. Rounding out the episode is acclaimed gymnastics coach Liang Chow, celebrated for guiding Gabby Douglas to the 2012 Olympic all-around gold and coaching Shawn Johnson to multiple medals at the 2008 Olympics.

programme.title: S1E3 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Paul Rabil, legendary professional lacrosse player and co-founder of the Premier Lacrosse League, celebrated as one of the greatest in the sport’s history. Also featured is Britney Henry, a standout track and field athlete from the University of Oregon who captured the Pac-10 Conference title in the hammer throw. Rounding out the episode is Meagan Martin, trailblazing competitor as the first female rookie to complete the American Ninja Warrior course and the first-ever Women’s Champion of the series.

programme.title: S1E1 Draft Story
programme.desc: In Part 1, we uncover the story of Tyvis Powell and the people who shaped him into the man and football player he is today. His road to the NFL was anything but easy, and it nearly never happened without the guidance of his mentor, Sean Williams. A Draft Story is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he makes the leap to professional football. Though he was not invited to Chicago for the 2016 NFL Draft, his journey is unforgettable. Witness the tension, hope, and emotion as Tyvis waits for the call that will change his life and etch the Powell name into NFL history. This is his Draft Story.

programme.title: S1 E2 Draft Story
programme.desc: A Draft Story” Part 2 is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he takes the leap into professional football. Facing unexpected challenges, honoring a promise to local kids, and navigating a situation he never imagined, Tyvis proves that the journey to the NFL is full of twists, heart, and determination.

programme.title: S1E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike delivers nonstop action with the world’s top riders. Watch Rachel Atherton, downhill champion, tear through Arrowhead, CA, Aaron Gwin, gravity master, and Steve Storey, trail innovator, dominate Trail Boik Time. Join Remy Metailler, freestyle phenom, in Puerto Vallarta, Mexico, and see Gee Atherton, enduro legend, and Dan Atherton, mountain bike pioneer, push speed, skill, and style to the max.

With quick-draw action, saddle humor, and even Alibi’s ventriloquist dummy ‘Elmer’ along for the ride, this lively Western delivers thrills, laughs, and plenty of frontier spirit.

With the Sons of the Pioneers riding along, the film blends fast-draw action, sly deception, and spirited Western songs for a rousing frontier adventure.
